nasb.text: The scribes and the Pharisees were watching Him closely to see if He healed on the Sabbath, so that they might find reason to accuse Him.

esv.text: And the scribes and the Pharisees watched him, to see whether he would heal on the Sabbath, so that they might find a reason to accuse him.

cnv.text: 經學家和法利賽人要看他會不會在安息日治病，好找把柄控告他。

ccb.text: 律法教师和法利赛人密切地监视耶稣，看祂会不会在安息日医治病人，好找个借口控告祂。

csbs.text: 经文士们和法利赛人就密切注意耶稣会不会在安息日使人痊愈，为要找把柄控告他。
